SMILE INDEX: 66
WINDOW: 941.300s to 977.667s (smile at 961.300s to 962.667s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[722.850-1086.150] interviewee: naturally to go to Palestine. I sent her in '39 in April to Palestine in order that I would be soon following. But I couldn't do it because I was in charge of the illegal Aliyah, of the illegal immigration from Poland to enter Palestine. And my friends said, Sig, you have time, you can always go because my papers were ready. But I stayed another

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
illegal Aliyah,
